headline: META Stock Ends Best Week In Two Months: Launches Gaming App For Vibe Coders Named 'Pocket'

headline: Entergy (ETR) Stock May Be Above Fair Value Despite Equity Raise
summary: Entergy stock has delivered a strong 168.9% total return over the past five years. Its current checks point to a richer valuation, with the Dividend Discount Model (DDM) suggesting the shares trade at a premium to intrinsic value, while market based multiples look roughly in line. Over five years, Entergy has returned 168.9%. This puts extra focus on whether the current price already reflects much of that progress. Recent equity issuance through the ATM and underwritten forward sale...
